examples: In French the adjective must agree with the noun in number and gender.
The adjective "inexpensive" used in the name is not without a reason.
But you can use it as an adjective to give emphasis to the word that follows it.
His spare style, full of threatening silences, has given rise to the adjective "Pinteresque".
The cabin seems a little ADJECTIVE, considering the out-of-place ADJECTIVE NOUN, but our heroes ignore it.
